updateRequirements.createNewDescriptionFirst: To create a new message, first draw the affected area as a polygon on the map. Afterwards, you can enter the related information in the form and save the message.
updateRequirements.createNewDescriptionSecond: This helps to report notes, changes, or errors in the map.
